problem.title: Problem & Solution
problem.subtitle: How Doctorato transforms clinic management challenges into a seamless experience
problem.p1: Manual appointment management causes chaos and conflicts
problem.p2: Paper-based patient records are prone to loss and damage
problem.p3: Manual billing is slow and error-prone
problem.p4: Difficulty tracking clinic performance and analyzing data
problem.s1: Smart booking system with automatic alerts and reminders
problem.s2: Secure electronic medical records with backup
problem.s3: Automated billing with PDF printing and tax support
problem.s4: Interactive dashboard with real-time reports and statistics
problem.s5: Internal chat and instant notifications for the team

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A specialized team in developing medical clinic management solutions
about.story_text: We started our journey in 2020 with one goal: to provide a comprehensive medical clinic management system that meets the needs of the Arab market. Today, Doctorato serves over 200 clinics and medical centers in more than 15 countries.
about.mission_text: Empowering clinics and medical centers to deliver better healthcare through integrated, easy-to-use technology solutions.
about.vision_text: To be the leading clinic management platform in the Arab world and the Middle East.

values.title: Our Values
values.innovation_desc: We always strive to deliver innovative and advanced solutions
values.security_desc: Protecting medical data is our top priority
values.support_desc: A dedicated support team available around the clock

about.hero_title: Building the Future of Clinic Management
about.hero_subtitle: A specialized team dedicated to empowering healthcare facilities with the latest and most reliable technology
about.testimonials_subtitle: Real testimonials from clinics and medical centers using Doctorato
about.story_p1: We started our journey in 2020 with a clear mission: to create a comprehensive clinic management system tailored for the Arab market.
about.story_p2: Our team combines deep healthcare domain expertise with cutting-edge technology skills to deliver solutions that truly matter.
about.story_p3: Today, Doctorato serves over 200 clinics and medical centers across 15+ countries, managing hundreds of thousands of patient records.
about.values_subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.value_innovation_desc: We continuously push boundaries to deliver cutting-edge solutions
about.value_trust_desc: Protecting medical data is our highest priority
about.value_customer_desc: Every feature is designed with the end user in mind
about.value_excellence_desc: We never compromise on quality in anything we deliver
about.timeline_subtitle: Key milestones in our growth story
about.timeline_2020_desc: Doctorato was founded with a vision to transform clinic management in the Arab world
about.timeline_2021_desc: Launched the first version with core modules for patient management and booking
about.timeline_2022_desc: Introduced the advanced dental module with interactive SVG chart
about.timeline_2023_desc: Expanded to 10+ countries with full bilingual support
about.timeline_2024_desc: Added CRM, HR, insurance, and inventory modules for enterprise-grade management
about.cta_subtitle: Be part of the digital transformation in healthcare

portals_page.admin_description: The most comprehensive portal with 95+ sub-modules. Full control over all medical, financial, operational, and marketing aspects.

portals_page.doctor_feature_4: Interactive dental chart and treatment plans
portals_page.patient_description: A self-service portal enabling patients to manage their appointments and view their medical and financial records easily.
portals_page.patient_feature_5: Personal dental chart and treatment plans
portals_page.secretary_description: Designed for reception staff to manage daily operations from patient check-in to booking management and payments.
portals_page.webmaster_description: A dedicated portal for managing website content without access to medical or financial data.
portals_page.website_description: A professional responsive website showcasing clinic services and enabling patients to book appointments online.
portals_page.details_subtitle: An in-depth look at each portal's features

solutions_page.hr_attendance_desc: Auto-logging with GPS tracking and tardiness monitoring
solutions_page.hr_leave_desc: Annual, sick, and emergency leave with approval workflow

solutions_page.hr_allowances_desc: Housing, transport, meals, and communications allowances
solutions_page.hr_advances_desc: Advance management with approval and repayment schedule
solutions_page.hr_penalties_desc: Documented penalties with reasons and amounts
solutions_page.hr_performance_desc: Employee productivity reports with attendance metrics
solutions_page.insurance_plans_desc: Define plans with coverage percentages and services
solutions_page.insurance_patient_linking_desc: Link patients to insurance plans with policy numbers
solutions_page.insurance_claims_desc: Create and track insurance claims with status tracking
solutions_page.insurance_preauth_desc: Manage pre-authorization requests before service delivery
solutions_page.inventory_supplies_desc: Manage supplies with categories and reorder levels
solutions_page.inventory_purchase_orders_desc: Create and track purchase orders with delivery status
solutions_page.inventory_stock_movement_desc: Automatic logging of all in/out movements
